## Summary

Describe what this pull request changes and why.

## Related issues

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] New skill
- [ ] Skill improvement
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Example or fixture
- [ ] Tooling or CI
- [ ] Other

## Checklist

- [ ] I used only synthetic or de-identified data.
- [ ] I did not include PHI.
- [ ] I avoided unsupported clinical claims.
- [ ] I added or updated examples where relevant.
- [ ] I documented safety boundaries.
- [ ] I ran the validation scripts (`python examples/scripts/validate_examples.py`).
- [ ] I updated `CHANGELOG.md` if the change is user-facing.
- [ ] Markdown renders cleanly and relative links resolve.

## Notes for reviewers

Anything reviewers should focus on, including assumptions or open questions.
